_meta.description: Canonical event inventory for ERP+MOM business objects using CloudEvents-compatible type naming.

events.purpose: Inventory balance snapshot projection was refreshed from transactional truth.
MES OEE snapshot projection was refreshed from execution truth.
Plant performance snapshot projection was refreshed from governed KPI sources.
Production BOM snapshot was refreshed from released order truth.
Production route snapshot was refreshed from released order truth.
Customer-care case was closed.
Customer-care case was escalated.
Customer-care case recorded a resolution.
Customer-care case entered active handling.
Commercial team acknowledged the customer PO.
Customer PO was closed after linked fulfillment reached terminal state.
Customer PO was confirmed against linked sales-order demand.
Customer PO was captured into governed commercial demand.
Quotation was accepted by the customer.
Quotation was converted into a sales order.
Quotation re-entered controlled revision.
Quotation was released to the customer.
Quote effectiveness review was recorded.
Quote effectiveness review was updated with additional learning.
Sales order was commercially closed.
Sales order was confirmed as executable customer demand.
Sales order entered commercial quotation posture.
Sales order was released into production planning.
Sales order shipment was released and completed.
AP invoice was closed after payment or void.
AP invoice was matched against PO and receipt truth.
AP invoice payment settlement completed.
AP invoice was posted into the ledger.
AR invoice was closed after settlement or cancellation.
Customer dispute was raised against the invoice.
Receivable was fully settled.
AR invoice moved into open receivable state.
Backdate exception was approved and timeboxed.
Backdate exception was closed after governed resolution.
Backdate exception naturally expired or was expired by control.
Backdate exception was revoked before further use.
Credit memo was approved and recorded.
Debit memo was approved and recorded.
Spend was capitalized into governed asset value.
Capitalization was posted into finance and asset truth.
Capitalized asset value was retired from active use.
Inventory valuation projection was refreshed from governed inventory truth.
Accounting period was formally closed for a governed ledger scope.
Accounting period was reopened under governed exception handling.
Reconciliation exception was closed after recovery.
Compensating action was recorded against the exception.
Integration exception was registered from reconciliation drift.
A retry or replay attempt was initiated.
Customer return was authorized.
Customer return reached terminal closure.
Customer return entered evaluation.
Customer return was physically received.
Cycle-count plan was completed with governed results.
Cycle-count plan was paused.
Cycle-count plan was released for counting.
Freight order was booked with a controlled carrier commitment.
Freight order was closed after reconciliation.
Freight order recorded delivery completion.
Freight order entered in-transit execution.
Item was released for operational use.
Item entered engineering-controlled state.
Item was blocked from new operational use.
Item was retired under obsolescence governance.
Inventory movement was placed on hold.
Inventory movement entered controlled review.
Inventory movement posted into stock truth.
Inventory movement was reversed under correction control.
Shipment reached delivered state with proof.
Shipment entered transport execution.
Shipment became ready for release.
Shipment was released to dispatch.
Stock balance projection was refreshed from governed inventory movement truth.
Warehouse was released for operational use.
Warehouse was archived from active scope.
Warehouse stopped new operational use.
Warehouse entered controlled hold.
5S audit closed under governed lean review.
5S audit findings moved into follow-up.
5S audit entered active execution.
5S audit follow-up was verified.
Incident was closed after corrective action.
Incident containment was recorded.
Incident entered formal investigation.
Incident was reported into the EHS system.
Maintenance plan was released into active scheduling.
Maintenance plan was approved.
Maintenance plan was placed on hold.
Maintenance plan was retired from future release.
Maintenance work order was cancelled.
Maintenance work order was completed.
Maintenance work order was released into execution.
Maintenance work order execution started.
Permit became active for operational use.
Permit was approved with governed conditions.
Permit was closed after controlled completion.
Permit entered approval flow.
Safety observation was archived under retention policy.
Safety observation was assigned to an owner.
Safety observation was closed.
Safety observation entered active response.
Asset disposal was recorded.
Asset entered governed hold.
Asset was retired from active service.
Compliance obligation was closed.
Compliance obligation became due.
Compliance obligation became overdue.
Compliance obligation was waived under approval.
Customer master was released for commercial use.
Customer master was archived from active scope.
Customer master stopped new commercial use.
Customer master entered controlled hold.
Employee became operationally active.
Employee record was archived.
Employee was suspended from operational eligibility.
Employee was terminated.
Equipment was released for active operational use.
Equipment entered lockout state.
Equipment qualification completed.
Equipment was retired from active use.
Measuring device was released for governed use.
Measuring device was blocked because calibration or condition became unacceptable.
Measuring device was retired from active use.
Supplier was archived from active sourcing scope.
Supplier was blocked from new procurement.
Supplier qualification was approved.
Supplier became spend-authorized.
Tool was blocked after breakage.
Tool entered active use.
Tool was qualified for issue.
Tool was retired from use.
Operator acknowledged the alarm.
Alarm response was cleared with evidence.
Alarm was escalated for response.
Machine or edge source raised an alarm.
Dispatch entry was closed after reconciliation.
Dispatch execution completed.
Dispatch entry entered active execution.
Dispatch entry was released into shopfloor horizon.
IPQC inspection accepted the in-process result.
IPQC inspection was routed back for reinspection.
IPQC inspection rejected the in-process result.
IPQC inspection entered active execution.
Job order was administratively closed.
Job order execution completed.

Production operation completed.

Production operation recorded scrap.
Production plan passed review and approval.

Production plan became the released factory plan.
Work order execution closed.

Work order execution started.

Incoming inspection rejected material into fail state.

Receipt cleared IQC acceptance.
Receipt moved into quarantine control.

Receipt was reversed under governed correction.
Requisition was approved for sourcing.
Requisition was cancelled.
Requisition demand was transferred into supplier execution.
Requisition entered formal approval review.
Supplier ASN was closed after downstream receiving completion.

Supplier ASN recorded a governed discrepancy.
Supplier ASN was physically received and is ready for receipt trace.
Supplier ASN entered active receiving preparation or execution.
Supplier PO was approved for spend commitment.

Supplier PO receiving reached governed received state.
Supplier PO was released to the supplier.
Audit program was closed with retained evidence.
Audit findings were recorded and released.
Audit program was scheduled under governed scope.
Audit program entered active execution.
Concession was approved and closed with trace.
Concession was opened for governed review.
Concession moved into approval review.
Concession request was rejected.
Control plan became effective for production or inspection execution.
Control plan was archived after replacement or obsolescence.

CAPA was closed after verified effectiveness.
CAPA entered effectiveness review.
CAPA implementation completed.

Deviation entered approval review.

Final inspection alias resolved to rejected outgoing quality truth.
